# Press Room
##  Welcome to   
Photonic's Press Room
Here you’ll find logos, images, and other information for editorial use. If you don’t find what you need, please reach out to one of our media contacts for assistance.
### Media Contacts
#### Laurie Davis
[+1 804 337 2569](tel:+18043372569)laurie_davis@interprosepr.com
#### Vivian Kelly
[+1 703 509 5412](tel:+17035095412)viviankelly@interprosepr.com
### Boilerplate
#### Short Form
Photonic is pioneering commercial-scale, distributed, fault-tolerant quantum computing and networking through its Entanglement First™ architecture, which leverages optically-linked silicon spin qubits for unmatched connectivity and scalability.
#### Long Form
Photonic Inc. is a leading quantum technology company developing commercial-scale quantum computers and quantum networks to address some of the world’s most pressing challenges in materials science, drug discovery, climate change, and security. The company’s approach unlocks performance at scale through unmatched distributed quantum computing capabilities. **Photonic’s Entanglement First™ architecture** leverages optically linked silicon spin qubits for high connectivity, enabling powerful computation, efficient error correction, and integration into existing data centre and telecom environments. Headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, with operations in the United States and the United Kingdom, Photonic employs over 160+ professionals and is backed by leading investors and multinational partners.

bricks-type-hero">Long Form</h4><div id="brxe-wcncmc" class="brxe-text-basic">Photonic Inc. is a leading quantum technology company developing commercial-scale quantum computers and quantum networks to address some of the world’s most pressing challenges in materials science, drug discovery, climate change, and security.

The company’s approach unlocks performance at scale through unmatched distributed quantum computing capabilities. <strong>Photonic’s Entanglement First™  architecture</strong> leverages optically linked silicon spin qubits for high connectivity, enabling powerful computation, efficient error correction, and integration into existing data centre and telecom environments.

Headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, with operations in the United States and the United Kingdom, Photonic employs over 160+ professionals and is backed by leading investors and multinational partners.</div></div></div><div id="brxe-ejzsjj" class="brxe-divider horizontal"><div class="line"></div></div><div id="brxe-bgetcu" class="brxe-block"><h3 id="brxe-lofytu" class="brxe-heading">Logos</h3><ul id="brxe-lrsahd" data-script-id="lrsahd" class="brxe-image-gallery bricks-layout-wrapper isotope" data-layout="masonry" style="position: relative;
